sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Equinix는 2026년 1분기 매출 24억 4,400만 달러를 기록하며 안정적인 반복 매출 모델을 유지하고 있습니다.

keyPoints.text: 매출의 90% 이상이 코로케이션, 인터커넥션 등 반복적인 수익 모델에서 발생하여 사업의 안정성을 확보하고 있습니다.
기존 고객으로부터 발생하는 월간 반복 매출(MRR) 비중이 90%를 상회하며 견고한 고객 유지력을 입증했습니다.
상위 50대 고객이 전체 매출의 상당 부분을 차지하며 대형 고객 중심의 매출 구조를 보이고 있습니다.

riskChanges.text: REIT 구조 유지 및 글로벌 데이터 센터 운영과 관련하여 규제 당국의 승인 및 법적 준수 리스크가 존재합니다.
atNorth 인수와 같은 대규모 합작 투자 및 자산 매각 과정에서 규제 승인 등 관례적인 거래 종결 조건이 리스크로 작용할 수 있습니다.

businessChanges.text: 1월 중 Hampton 데이터 센터 캠퍼스 자산을 AMER 3 합작 투자사에 4억 5,900만 달러에 매각하며 자산 포트폴리오를 최적화했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2026년 1분기 매출 24억 4,400만 달러, 영업이익 5억 7,700만 달러, 순이익 4억 1,500만 달러를 달성했습니다.
총자산 408억 9,800만 달러 규모를 보유하고 있으며, 현금및현금성자산은 13억 6,200만 달러로 유동성을 확보했습니다.

watchItems.text: 반복 매출 비중이 높은 안정적 사업 구조를 유지하고 있으나, 대규모 합작 투자 및 자산 매각이 향후 수익성 및 REIT 배당 재원에 미칠 영향을 모니터링해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2026-03-31 revenue = 24억 4,400만 달러 (USD 2.444B; 2,444 million), XBRL range 2026-01-01..2026-03-31.
Quarter ended 2026-03-31 operating income = 5억 7,700만 달러 (USD 0.577B; 577 million), XBRL range 2026-01-01..2026-03-31.
Quarter ended 2026-03-31 net income = 4억 1,500만 달러 (USD 0.415B; 415 million), XBRL range 2026-01-01..2026-03-31.
Quarter ended 2026-03-31 total assets = 408억 9,800만 달러 (USD 40.898B; 40,898 million), XBRL range instant..2026-03-31.
Quarter ended 2026-03-31 cash and cash equivalents = 13억 6,200만 달러 (USD 1.362B; 1,362 million), XBRL range instant..2026-03-31.

Revenue Our business is primarily based on a recurring revenue model comprised of colocation, interconnection and managed infrastructure offerings. We consider these offerings recurring because our customers are generally billed on a fixed and recurring basis each month for the duration of their contract, which is generally one to five years in length and thereafter automatically renews in one-year increments. Our recurring revenues have comprised more than 90% of our total revenues during the past three years. In addition, during the past three years, more than 90% of our monthly recurring revenue bookings came from existing customers, contributing to our revenue growth. Our largest customer accounted for approximately 2% of our recurring revenues for the three months ended March 31, 2026 and 3% for the three months ended March 31, 2025. Our 50 largest customers accounted for approximat

General and Administrative. Our general and administrative expenses consist primarily of salaries and related expenses including stock-based compensation, accounting, legal and other professional service fees, and other general corporate expenses, such as our corporate regional headquarters office leases and depreciation expense on back office systems. Taxation as a REIT We elected to be taxed as a REIT for U.S. federal income tax purposes beginning with our 2015 taxable year. As of March 31, 2026, our REIT structure included a majority of our data center operations in the Americas and EMEA regions, as well as the data center operations in Japan, Singapore, and Malaysia. Our data center operations in other jurisdictions are operated as TRSs. We have also included our share of the assets in xScale joint ventures (with the exception of South Korea) in our REIT structure. As a REIT, we gene

Highlights • In January, we sold the assets and liabilities relating to the Hampton data center campus ("Hampton Campus"), which were included within our Americas region, to the AMER 3 Joint Venture for total consideration of $459 million. See Note 4 within the condensed consolidated financial statements. • In February, we entered into an equity commitment letter with a subsidiary of Canadian Pension Plan Investment Board to contribute up to $963 million in exchange for approximately 40% ownership of the subsidiary, in connection with the subsidiary's planned acquisition of atNorth, a Nordic high-density colocation and built-to-suit data center provider. Our contribution is subject to customary closing conditions, including regulatory approvals, for the joint purchase of atNorth.
